name: waseem-brain
description: Offline-first multimodal brain runtime for memory, routing, typed experts, and deployable web delivery.
author: Muhammad Waseem Akram

scripts.test: pnpm run lint && pnpm run guard:placeholders && pnpm run test:ts && pnpm run test:python
scripts.test:all: pnpm run lint && pnpm run guard:placeholders && pnpm run test:ts && pnpm run test:python
scripts.lint: node scripts/run_python.mjs -m ruff check --select E9,F63,F7,F82 brain/runtime.py brain/experts/expert.py brain/experts/pool.py brain/experts/registry.py brain/memory/vector_store.py scripts/runtime_daemon.py scripts/evolve_knowledge.py scripts/project_report.py scripts/sync_workspace_metadata.py && node scripts/run_python.mjs -m mypy --follow-imports=silent brain/runtime.py brain/experts/expert.py brain/experts/pool.py brain/experts/registry.py brain/memory/vector_store.py
scripts.format: node scripts/run_python.mjs -m black brain scripts tests/python && node scripts/run_python.mjs -m ruff format brain scripts tests/python experts
scripts.install:all: pnpm install && pnpm run setup:python && pnpm run sync:metadata && pnpm run build:all
scripts.verify:project: pnpm run sync:metadata && pnpm run report:project
scripts.build:web: node -e "require('fs').rmSync('interface/generated',{recursive:true,force:true})" && tsc -p tsconfig.web.json && node scripts/annotate_generated_js.mjs interface/generated
scripts.dev:interface:raw: pnpm run build:web && pnpm exec tsx interface/src/server.ts

build.description: Build the app dist and copy the required static assets.

build:ts.description: Compile the app-only TypeScript sources into dist.

build:python.description: Build the Python wheel into dist/python.

build:rust.description: Build the optional Rust router accelerator.

setup:python.description: Install the maintained runtime and development Python extras.

setup:python:full.description: Install runtime, development, and training Python extras.

sync:metadata.description: Mirror pyproject metadata and dependency groups into package.json.

report:inventory.description: Write a file and dependency inventory without running verification commands.

report:project.description: Generate inventory, verification summaries, assistant-surface readiness, and Docker smoke status.

verify:project.description: Sync metadata, then generate the full project report artifacts and Docker smoke status.

docker:smoke.description: Run the industrial Docker smoke verification for compose boot, assistant reachability, and restart persistence.

lint.description: Run the maintained-core Python lint and type gate.

typecheck:ts.description: Typecheck the interface and TypeScript tests without emitting dist files.

test:python.description: Run the Python runtime and integration test suite.

test:ts.description: Typecheck and run the TypeScript interface test suite.

test:all.description: Run the TypeScript and Python baseline verification suites.

test:coverage.description: Run Python tests with coverage output.

runtime:start.description: Start the detached Python runtime daemon.

runtime:stop.description: Stop the detached Python runtime daemon.

runtime:status.description: Show the detached Python runtime daemon status.

chat.description: Start the terminal chat against the hot runtime daemon.

start:python.description: Start the Python runtime module directly.

dev.description: Open the interactive dev launcher for interface, terminal, and backend.

dev:interface.description: Start the browser interface and auto-start the backend daemon.

dev:terminal.description: Start the terminal chat and auto-start the backend daemon.

dev:both.description: Start the browser interface and terminal chat on the same hot backend.

dev:backend.description: Start the backend daemon only and leave the UI selection for later.
